_metadata.description: Allowlist of supplement canonical_ids tolerated as referential orphans in the interaction pipeline. Each entry covers a pairwise interaction surfaced in interaction_db.sqlite that does not yet have a matching ingredient_interaction_rules.json rule. Entries here are tracked, time-bound backlog items — not silent exceptions — and each MUST carry a reason and a TODO so the gate stays meaningful.
_metadata.purpose: Allowlist for supplement canonical_ids that appear in pairwise interactions (interaction_db.sqlite) but do NOT have a corresponding entry in ingredient_interaction_rules.json. Used by audit_source_of_truth_contract.py::audit_interaction's INTERACTION_ORPHAN_SUPPLEMENT_CANONICAL referential-integrity check. Each entry MUST cite a reason and a TODO for clearing the backlog. Entries here are tolerated but tracked.
_metadata.note: DO NOT add entries here to silence the gate. Add only when (a) the orphan is intentional (pairwise-only signal) or (b) the orphan is a known data bug pending fix. Each entry must include a reason and a tracking note.
migration_notes: 2026-05-27: Removed phosphatidylserine entry. Root cause fixed in source — DSI_LEVOTHYROXINE_SOY and DSI_OC_SOY agent2_canonical_id reassigned to genistein (correct canonical for soy isoflavones).

2026-06-09: Interaction identities normalized to clean ingredient ids (BANNED_RED_YEAST_RICE->red_yeast_rice, BANNED_CBD_US->cbd, NOOTROPIC_VINPOCETINE->vinpocetine) so catalog key_ingredient_tags join the curated pairwise rules. These three are blocked/banned supplements: they carry real drug-pairwise interactions but no ingredient-scoring rule, so they are tracked here as pairwise-only orphans. Replaced the old NOOTROPIC_VINPOCETINE entry; added red_yeast_rice and cbd.

allowlist.reason: Vinpocetine has a real pharmacokinetic interaction with anticoagulants (CYP/P-gp pathways, antiplatelet effect) recorded in DSI_ANTICOAG_VINPOCETINE, but no standalone ingredient_interaction_rules.json entry yet. Blocked/banned supplement — surfaced in pairwise interactions only.
allowlist.todo: Add RULE_VINPOCETINE_BLEEDING entry to ingredient_interaction_rules.json with bleeding_disorders and surgery_scheduled condition_rules.

allowlist.reason: Red yeast rice contains monacolin K (chemically identical to lovastatin); combined with statins it compounds statin exposure (myopathy/rhabdomyolysis risk), recorded in DSI_STATINS_RYR. Blocked/banned supplement with no standalone ingredient_interaction_rules.json scoring rule — surfaced in pairwise interactions only.
allowlist.todo: Add RULE_RED_YEAST_RICE_STATIN entry to ingredient_interaction_rules.json (additive statin myopathy risk).

allowlist.reason: CBD inhibits CYP2C9/CYP3A4 with documented pairwise interactions: anticoagulants (raised exposure/bleeding, DSI_ANTICOAG_CBD), antihypertensives (additive hypotension, DSI_ANTIHYP_CBD), and statins (raised exposure, DSI_STATINS_CBD). Blocked/banned supplement with no standalone ingredient_interaction_rules.json scoring rule — surfaced in pairwise interactions only.
allowlist.todo: Add RULE_CBD_CYP_INTERACTIONS entry to ingredient_interaction_rules.json (CYP2C9/CYP3A4-mediated interactions).
